# Golden file: macos.privacy pack (iCloud rules)
format: v1
---
# icloud delete quoted path
command: rm "~/Library/Mobile Documents/file.txt"
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-delete
---
# icloud delete single-quoted
command: rm '~/Library/Mobile Documents/old/'
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-delete
---
# icloud delete CloudDocs subdir
command: rm -rf "~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/"
decision: Deny
severity: Critical
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-delete
---
# icloud overwrite quoted
command: cp file.txt "~/Library/Mobile Documents/"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-overwrite
---
# icloud overwrite mv
command: mv draft.pdf "~/Library/Mobile Documents/final.pdf"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-overwrite
---
# icloud overwrite cp
command: cp -r src/ "~/Library/Mobile Documents/backup/"
decision: Ask
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-overwrite
---
# icloud access cat
command: cat "~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/file.txt"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-access
---
# icloud access ls
command: ls "~/Library/Mobile Documents/"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-access
---
# icloud access find
command: find "~/Library/Mobile Documents/" -name "*.pdf"
decision: Ask
severity: Medium
confidence: Medium
pack: macos.privacy
rule: icloud-access
